titleZh: 公司法下数据资产出资的法定要件、困境与律师实务
titleEn: Data-Asset Contributions Under Company Law: Statutory Requirements, Difficulties, and Legal Practice
abstractZh: 讨论数据资源作为非货币出资的法律要件、估值与确权困难，以及资本充实原则下律师在交易设计和合规审查中的角色。
abstractEn: Examines whether data assets can qualify as lawful non-cash contributions and the valuation, title, and capital-maintenance issues that follow for lawyers structuring such transactions.
